candidate_lesson.lesson_text: Trades whose decision path did not call log_forex_decision() (reconstructed-from-fills entries) cluster catastrophically at 1W/5L — untraceable entries are a proxy for entries that bypassed the signal-gating stack entirely and must be blocked, not just logged.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: When an entry is reconstructed from the OANDA fills ledger with empty entry_context, signal_layers_active=[], and null commitment_score, it means the order was placed outside the vetted EdgePipeline path — no session gate (L2 NY_PM veto), no grade check (L1), no VIX carry gate (L8) fired. These are exactly the ungated impulse trades the tenets exist to prevent; the four USD_CAD LONGs all scratched at -0.0R (stopped at breakeven/entry noise) because there was no thesis behind them to defend the position.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if decision.signal_layers_active == [] or decision.commitment_score is None: return ForexVeto('untraced_entry — no gated signal path'); log for audit.
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes the 5 zero/negative-R untraced trades from the sample — with only the 1 properly-signaled USD_JPY LONG (+1.921R) surviving, this directly lifts win rate and avg R, reducing return variance and improving Sharpe toward the +0.05 gap.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: 6 closed trades: 1W/5L, avg R +0.153. The single winner (USD_JPY +1.921R) is the only one with a plausible macro thesis (consensus 16/30 bull, dir=LONG); the 4 USD_CAD losers and 1 AUD_NZD loser all realized ≤ 0R.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: All 6 entries share why_this_trade='RECONSTRUCTED from fills ledger; entry path did not call log_forex_decision()', empty entry_context={}, signal_layers_active=[], null commitment_score — 5 of these 6 untraced trades produced ≤0R (four USD_CAD at exactly -0.0R).

reflection.system_health_note: System is effectively blind — 0 trades in the last 7 days and all 6 historical trades were untraceable fills with no logged reasoning, so no reliable in-sample edge can be measured until the logging path is enforced and 30+ properly-gated trades accumulate.
